title: CCB Relevant Statutes and Rules — Residential Contracts (2014)
description: CCB explanatory compilation of residential contract statutes and rules (dated reference for context).

title: Oregon CCB Contractor Tools
description: Official CCB contractor guidance for required contracts, notices, cancellation rights, and compliance tools.

title: CCB Required Notices for Residential Construction Projects (Chart)
description: Official CCB summary chart of required residential notices, timing, proof of delivery, and authority references.

title: NASCLA Contractors Guide to Business, Law and Project Management — Oregon, 2nd Edition
description: Exam reference textbook identified by PSI for Oregon construction contractor testing.

title: OAR 812-009 — CCB Administrative Rules: Licensing and Conduct
description: Oregon Administrative Rules promulgated by the CCB governing contractor conduct, complaint procedures, and enforcement actions.

title: Oregon CCB Pre-License Education Requirements
description: Official CCB page describing the 16-hour pre-license training requirement.

title: ORS 701.305 — Written Contract Requirements for Residential Contractors
description: Oregon statute specifying when a written contract is required for residential construction work and what it must contain, including the CCB license number, price, dates, and right-of-rescission notice.

title: ORS 701.310 — Additional Contract Disclosures
description: Oregon statute detailing required bond and insurance disclosures that must appear in residential construction contracts.

title: ORS 701.315 — Contents of Contract for Work on Residential Structure
description: Oregon statute prohibiting residential contract provisions that limit CCB complaint rights and allowing mediation/arbitration provisions.

title: ORS 701.330 — Consumer Notice Form; Notice of Procedure Form
description: Oregon statute requiring CCB consumer notice and notice-of-procedure forms for residential projects.

title: ORS 83.720 — Cancellation of Home Solicitation Sale
description: Oregon statute providing three-business-day cancellation rights for qualifying home solicitation sales and exceptions.

title: ORS 83.730 — Written Agreement Requirements for Home Solicitation Sales
description: Oregon statute specifying required written contents and cancellation notices for home solicitation sales.

title: ORS Chapter 701 — Construction Contractors
description: Oregon Revised Statutes governing construction contractor licensing, bonds, and enforcement.

title: PSI Candidate Information Bulletin — Oregon Construction Contractors
description: Official PSI exam blueprint covering format, content areas, and passing criteria for the Oregon CCB exam.
